name: Black Forest Pumpernickel Bread (Abm)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat your oven to the light crust setting.
2. Cool the bread for 1 hour before slicing.
Note: I always do something... But I like to add 1 tsp instant espresso powder for flavor. I've also done this bread on a dough cycle and finished it in my oven.
